summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Factor Dopamina. 12/12 backend pytest tests pass. Public site (Home/Cursos/Detail/Contacto) and Admin CRUD (login, list, create, edit, delete) all working. One minor frontend issue: admin logout button does not redirect to /admin/login.

minor.issue: Underscore is stripped without word boundary so 'TEST_Curso' becomes 'testcurso' (joins two words). Consider replacing underscores with space before slugify.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking admin-logout-button does not redirect to /admin/login; user stays on /admin (after 2s wait URL still /admin). Likely missing navigate('/admin/login') after logout() or auth state not clearing properly.

integration_issues.issue: Course cards on Home page did not match selector course-card-{slug} (count=0). They may use a different data-testid. Cursos page lists 6 cards correctly (5 seed + 1 test leftover at time of test).

action_items: Fix admin logout flow: ensure navigate('/admin/login') runs after clearing auth state, or AuthContext logout clears token+user so route guard redirects.
Verify Home page featured course cards expose data-testid="course-card-{slug}" (currently selector returned 0 on Home; works on /cursos).
Optional: improve make_slug to treat underscores as separators (current behavior strips them, joining words).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 462-line file mixing models, routes, auth, storage, seed; acceptable for MVP but consider splitting.
Cookie samesite='none' + secure=True is correct for cross-site HTTPS preview.
_id is excluded with projection {"_id":0} consistently — good.
Login does not rate-limit / lockout after N failures (playbook requires brute-force lockout after 5 fails) — not implemented.
Slug generation strips underscores without separator — see backend minor issue.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_ courses during testing (cleanup completed via API and UI).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_factor_dopamina.py — run with pytest. Frontend UI worked end-to-end except logout redirect. /cursos has 6 cards due to a leftover TEST course created during one run; final cleanup may have left it if a flow errored — verify count is back to 5.
rca_of_logout_issue: Likely AuthContext.logout() does not navigate after clearing state, OR the ProtectedRoute does not re-evaluate immediately. Check /app/frontend/src/context/AuthContext.jsx and the logout handler in AdminDashboardPage.
